# Version 4.151.0
> **New minor release** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 ships 2 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia submodule to drop SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redef** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))
- **Skia to milestone m151 (4.151.0)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
